criteriaResults.criterion: AppShell component wraps all pages with sidebar and header
criteriaResults.evidence: App.tsx wraps all Routes inside AppShell. AppShell renders Sidebar, Header, main, MobileNav. Verified via code review and Playwright smoke test.

criteriaResults.criterion: Sidebar displays nav items: Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, Team, Settings with Lucide icons
criteriaResults.evidence: navItems.ts defines 5 items with Lucide icons. Playwright test confirms 5 links with correct labels and SVG icons.

criteriaResults.criterion: Each nav item links to corresponding route via React Router NavLink
criteriaResults.evidence: Sidebar.tsx uses NavLink. Deep validation confirms hrefs: /, /projects, /tasks, /team, /settings. Navigation test passes.

criteriaResults.criterion: Active page highlighted with distinct background/text color
criteriaResults.evidence: NavLink applies bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 when active. Playwright test confirms class on Dashboard link at /.

criteriaResults.criterion: Sidebar collapse toggle button shrinks to icons-only mode
criteriaResults.evidence: Toggle changes w-60 to w-16, hides text labels, keeps SVG icons visible. Two Playwright tests pass.

criteriaResults.criterion: Collapsed/expanded state persists via SidebarContext to localStorage
criteriaResults.evidence: SidebarContext uses useLocalStorage('sidebar-collapsed'). After collapse and reload, sidebar remains collapsed (w-16). localStorage value is 'true'.
Sidebar renders <aside> with <nav aria-label='Main navigation'>. Playwright test verifies both elements.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header fixed at top, spans content area width
criteriaResults.evidence: Header has sticky top-0 z-30. Computed style: position=sticky, top=0px. Spans content area as flex child.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains search input with search icon and placeholder text
criteriaResults.evidence: Search Lucide icon and input[type=search] with placeholder='Search...' present. Both visible in Playwright tests.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains notifications bell icon with unread dot indicator
criteriaResults.evidence: Bell icon button with red dot span (bg-red-500 rounded-full) visible. Playwright test confirms both elements.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains user avatar that opens dropdown menu on click
criteriaResults.evidence: Avatar button toggles dropdown with role='menu'. Playwright test confirms click opens dropdown.

criteriaResults.criterion: Dropdown contains Profile, Settings, Logout options
criteriaResults.evidence: Three menuitem buttons with correct labels visible in dropdown. Playwright test confirms.
useClickOutside hook on userMenuRef. Clicking main closes dropdown. Playwright test passes.

criteriaResults.criterion: Below 768px: sidebar hidden, hamburger icon in header
criteriaResults.evidence: Sidebar hidden md:flex, hamburger md:hidden. At 375px: sidebar hidden, hamburger visible. Playwright test passes.

criteriaResults.criterion: Mobile: hamburger opens full-screen overlay with backdrop
criteriaResults.evidence: MobileNav renders fixed inset-0 overlay with bg-black/50 backdrop and role=dialog. Playwright test confirms at 375px.

criteriaResults.criterion: Mobile overlay has close (X) button and closes on nav item click
criteriaResults.evidence: X button with aria-label='Close navigation menu' and NavLink onClick={onClose}. Two Playwright tests pass.

criteriaResults.criterion: Tablet (768-1024px): sidebar shows icons only by default
criteriaResults.evidence: At 900px viewport, sidebar class is w-60 (expanded) with Dashboard text label visible. No responsive auto-collapse logic exists for tablet viewports.
7 smoke tests pass. No console errors. Build and TypeScript compilation succeed.

issues.title: Tablet sidebar not icons-only by default
issues.criterion: Tablet (768-1024px): sidebar shows icons only by default
issues.expected: Sidebar auto-collapsed to w-16 with icons only at 768-1024px viewports
issues.actual: Sidebar fully expanded (w-60) with text labels at all viewports >= 768px
issues.evidence: Playwright test at 900px shows w-60 class and visible Dashboard text label

handoff.handoffNotes: Created defect subtask 6.1 to fix tablet viewport sidebar auto-collapse. 16/17 criteria pass. The missing feature requires responsive logic to detect tablet viewport (768-1024px) and default sidebar to collapsed/icons-only mode.
